---
title: "Uptown Girls"
description: "⭐⭐"
date: "3/1/2026"
image: "uptowngirls.jpg"
---

I'm sorry, but that dude singing "Molly Smiles" did not redeem him sleeping with Rae's mom for me...😐

Brittany Murphy was such a beauty

"'We need to talk.' Those are the four most hateful words in the English language." Dead
